title: Proclamation No. 177, s. 1937
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 177

RESERVING FOR SETTLEMENT FARM SCHOOL PURPOSES THREE PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF DAGUIT, MUNICIPALITY OF LABO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for settlement farm school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcels of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Daguit, municipality of Labo, Province of Camarines Norte, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Mr-348, to wit:

Lot No. S4SG. —Beginning at a point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-348, which is identical with F. Z. monument No. 36, Labo cadastre, thence S. 84° 23′ E. 430.22 m. to point 2; S. 33° 27′ W. 278.08 m. to point 3; N. 87° 56′ W. 14.09 m. to point 4; S. 62° 05′ W. 119.26 m. to point 5; N. 67° 41′ W. 15.86 m. to point 6; N. 36° 36′ W. 54.84 m. to point 7; N. 65° 51′ W. 20.00 m. to point 8; N. 73° 01′ W. 45.69 m. to point 9; N. 48° 20′ W. 51.46 m. to point 10; N. 64° 42′ W. 29.20 m. to point 11; N. 89° 38′ W. 9.31 m. to point 12; N. 88° 38′ W. 97.43 m. to point 13; S. 65° 02′ W. 41.00 m. to point 14; N. 18° 42′ W. 49.90 m. to point 15; N. 7° 39′ E. 35.00 m. to point 16; N. 18° 34′ E. 52.13 m. to point 17; N. 11° 06′ W. 43.46 m. to point 18; N. 10° 00′ W. 58.26 m. to point 19; S. 88° 16′ E. 175.91 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 129,391 square meters.

Points 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, and 14, old B. L. concrete monuments; points 3 and 8, old galvanized iron spikes on trees; points 15, 16, 17, and 18, old stakes; point 19, galvanized iron spikes on tree.

Bounded on the northeast, by lot No. 3467; on the southeast, by lot No. 2845 and provincial road; on the southwest, by provincial road; and on the west, by Mabababal Creek.

Lot No. 3467. —Beginning at a point marked “1” on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-348, S. 84° 23′ E. 430.22 m., more or less, from F. Z. monument No. 36, Labo cadastre, thence N. 84° 23′ W. 430.22 m. to point 2; N. 88° 16′ W. 175.91 m. to point 3; N. 14° 22′ E. 86.39 m. to point 4; N. 49° 22′ E. 45.25 m. to point 5; N. 70° 37′ E. 67.66 m. to point 6; N. 82° 00′ E. 65.06 m. to point 7; N. 78° 05′ E. 44.45 m. to point 8; S. 78° 07′ E. 37.00 m. to point 9; N. 79° 22′ E. 39.34 m. to point 10; N. 29° 42′ E. 33.25 m. to point 11; N. 67° 14′ E. 119.68 m. to point 12; S. 32°.20′ E. 326.77 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 92,015 square meters.

Points 1 and 12, old B. L. concrete monuments; point 2, F. Z. No. 36; points 3 and 4, old galvanized iron spikes on trees; points 5 to 11, inclusive, old stakes.

Bounded on the northeast, by lot No. 3476-B; on the southwest, by lot No. 3466; and on the west and northwest, by Mabababal Creek and lot No. 3476-B.

Lot No. 3476-B. —Beginning- at a point marked “I” on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-348, S. 84° 23′ E. 430.22 m., more or less, from F. Z. monument No. 36, Labo cadastre, thence N. 32° 20′ W. 326.77 m. to point 2; S. 70° 20′ W. 120.49 m. to point 3; S. 30° 20′ W. 33.00 m. to point 4; S. 79° 29′ W. 35.80 m. to point 5; N. 77° 59′ W. 37.89 m. to point 6; S. 77° 32′ W. 42.62 m. to point 7; S. 81° 44′ W. 68.60 m. to point 8; S. 71° 11′ W. 68.18 m. to point 9; S. 53° 26′ W. 40.15 m. to point 10; S. 16° 37′ W. 92.43 m. to point 11; N. 46° 23′ W. 113.26 m. to point 12; N. 10° 17′ W. 51.69 m. to point 13; S. 86° 41′ W. 39.78 m. to point 14; N. 59° 12′ W. 53.04 m. to point 15; N. 32° 22′ E. 44.58 m. to point 16; N. 49° 20′ E. 80.42 m. to point 17; N. 39° 27′ E. 31.40 m. to point 18; N. 64° 49′ E. 53.56 m. to point 19; N. 57° 13′ E. 29.82 m. to point 20; N. 86° 22′ E. 47.10 m. to point 21; N. 38° 39′ E. 40.00 m. to point 22; N. 6° 59′ W. 34.57 into point 23; N. 41° 47′ E. 24.91 m. to point 24; N. 44° 19′ E. 55.67 m. to point 25; N. 30° 26′ E. 43.88 m. to point 26; N. ,10° 20′ W. 32.68 m. to point 27; N. 58° 54′ E. 32.49 m. to point 28; N. 86° 17′ E. 189.46 m. to point 29; S. 85° 53′ E. 74.67 m. to point 30; S. 40° 14′ E. 485.27 m. to point 31; S. 58° 57′ W. 41.69 m. to point 32; S. 74° 14′ W. 26.50 into point 33; S. 4° 57′ W. 25.86 m. to point 34; S. 5° 10′ W. 24.90 m. to point 35; S. 51° 33′ W. 15.94 m. to point 36; S. 59° 40′ W. 60.55 m. to point 37; S. 3° 47′ W. 92.60 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 247,914 square meters.

Points 1 and 2, old B. L. concrete monuments; points 3 to 10, inclusive, old stakes; point 11, old galvanized iron spikes on tree; points 12 to 27 and 32 to 35, inclusive, stakes; points 28, 29, 30, and 31, B. L. concrete monuments; points 36 and 37, galvanized iron spikes on crosses on trees.

Bounded on the north and northeast, by lot No. 3476-C; on the southeast, by lot No. 3476-C, Mabababal Creek, and lot No. 3467; on the southwest, by lot No. 3467 and lot No. 3476-C; and on the northwest, by lot No. 3476-C.

Bearings true. Declination, 1° 02′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-348.

Surveyed: October 25-28, 1935. Approved: June 12, 1936.

NOTE.—This is a subdivision of lot No. 3476 of Labo cadastre No. 238, case No. 4.

Lot No. 3476-B=Lot No. 3488 of Labo cadastre No. 238, case No. 4.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-fourth day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-seven, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the second.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: ELPIDIO QUIRINO Secretary of the Interior

Source : Legislative Library, House of Representatives
